overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a female character hiking through an arid desert mountain landscape. The character navigates rocky terrain and dry scrub vegetation under a clear blue sky, continuously ascending from lower slopes toward a ridge top with expansive distant views.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert hillside with scattered rocks and dry scrub

events.description: terrain transitions from flat desert scrub to rocky uphill slope with larger boulders

agents.ego_description: running steadily uphill through desert terrain toward rocky hillside, navigating around small bushes and rocks

entered.detail: large reddish-brown hill forming the main climb objective ahead
medium-sized boulders and rock outcrops scattered across the desert floor
dry brown bushes and sparse desert plants dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a desert hillside covered in dry scrub and scattered rocks. The terrain is open and sunlit, with a prominent hill rising ahead. The character runs steadily forward, navigating the uneven dirt ground as the slope gradually steepens.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with large boulder formations

events.description: large rock wall enters view on the left as character enters denser rocky terrain
character climbs over and navigates between large boulders, adjusting path through rocky obstacles

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain, climbing over boulders and squeezing between large rock formations on the left

entered.detail: massive vertical rock formation rising on the left side of the path, creating a wall-like barrier
dense cluster of large boulders blocking direct path, requiring navigation around and over

segments.scene_description: The character enters a rocky mountain pass where large boulder formations dominate the landscape. A massive rock wall rises on the left while the path winds through clusters of boulders. The character climbs over rocks and adjusts direction to navigate the increasingly rugged terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert ridge with panoramic valley views

events.description: exiting the rocky pass, the large rock wall falls behind and view opens to expansive desert valley
reaching ridge top reveals distant desert landscape and mountains on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking along the ridge top, occasionally turning to survey the expansive desert landscape opening to the right

entered.detail: vast open desert valley stretching to the horizon with layered rock formations
elevated rocky ridge providing vantage point over the surrounding desert landscape

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the rocky pass, the character reaches an open ridge top with panoramic views of a vast desert valley stretching to the horizon. The large rock formations fall behind as the terrain opens up, revealing distant mountains and layered desert terrain under the clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a sunlit desert hillside into a rugged mountain pass that eventually opens onto a panoramic ridge. It begins with the character running steadily across open, uneven dirt ground covered in dry scrub as the slope gradually steepens. As the terrain becomes more challenging, the scene shifts into a narrow pass dominated by massive boulder formations and a towering rock wall that forces the character to climb and wind through the rugged landscape. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the rocky enclosure, where the restrictive walls fall away to reveal a vast desert valley. Finally, the view expands across a wide ridge top, unveiling distant mountains and layered desert terrain stretching toward the horizon under a clear blue sky.
